data_quality_warnings: Test set currently has 86 records but only 2 unique prompts
85 of 86 test records share the exact same user prompt as training and validation records
This creates severe leakage and will inflate test scores
Test set MUST be regenerated from held-out test_specs.jsonl with varied prompt templates
Current test set is NOT suitable for final evaluation
